{{Card Infobox|Brightest Flame||2|}}
{{C|Brightest Flame||2}} is a 0 {{Icon|CE|2}} cost {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|Colorless|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Skill|Skill|2}} Card. It gives 2 (3 if upgraded) {{Icon|CE|2}} and draws 2 (3 if upgraded) cards, but also reduces your Max HP by 1.

== Obtaining Brightest Flame==
Can be obtained by taking {{R|Storybook||2}} from {{KW|Tezcatara||2}}'s offering at the start of [[StS2:Acts#Act 2|Act 2]].

== Update History ==
*'''Early Access v0.98'''
**Added Brightest Flame to the game.
